meaning: principles[复]罗奇代尔合作社原则
examples: Copy and typography complement each other and give Rochdale an aesthetic voice.
Rochdale was, and still is, produced by a local orchard and brewery in Nelson, New Zealand.
The family wanted Rochdale to represent history and tradition, but feel fresh and new within the growing cider market.
Six times as many are claiming in some parts of Rochdale as in Cambridge.
An extension of Greater Manchester's Metrolink tram network which links Rochdale with Manchester has opened.
